'''Barhu''' was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] from the single [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Churba system]]. It was a high-temperature, rocky world that was considered to have no civilized purpose.<ref name="DFRS" />

{{Planet-stub}}
